title: PipePlus
body:
↓CurseForge may update faster↓
PipePlus (CurseForge)

This is Simple BC Pipes's Addon.

これはSimple BC Pipesのアドオンです。

現在, Forgeに移植する予定はありません. (移植しても構いません)

There are currently no plans to port it to Forge. (You can port it)

 

銅などの鉱石は用意していないため、TechRebornなどを入れることをおすすめします。

Since it does not have copper ore etc, so we recommend adding Tech Reborn etc.

(since i'm japanese, there may be incorrect english, and i would appreciate it if you could report it to "Issues".)

What to add

  • Copper Transport Pipe(銅パイプ)...Extract item from the container connected once to 20Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Tin Transport Pipe(錫パイプ)...Extract item from the container connected once to 10Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Silver Transport Pipe(銀パイプ)...Extract item from the container connected once to 5Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Copper Fluid Pipe(液体用銅パイプ)...Extract fluid from the container connected once to 20Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Tin Fluid Pipe(液体用錫パイプ)...Extract fluid from the container connected once to 10Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Silver Fluid Pipe(液体用銀パイプ)...Extract fluid from the container connected once to 5Ticks.(Right click to connect)
  • Emerald Transport Pipe(エメラルドパイプ)...About 1.5 times faster than the Simple Item Gold Pipe of SimpleBC Pipes.
  • Ruby Transport Pipe(ルビーパイプ)...2 times faster than the Simple Item Gold Pipe of SimpleBC Pipes.
  • Obsidian Transport Pipe(黒曜石パイプ)...Item insertion pipe(The range is expanded by passing the RedStone signal.)
  • Ender Pipe(エンダーパイプ)...Item collection pipe(The range is expanded by passing the RedStone signal.)
  • RedStone Transport Pipe(レッドストーンパイプ)...When an item enters this pipe, it emits a Red Stone signal.
  • CobbleStone Transport Pipe(丸石パイプ)...Cannot connect to stone pipe
  • Void Transport Pipe...Destorys Items
  • Teleport Transport Pipe...It is a reproduction with a defect of Additional Pipes. (Experimental)

 (If teleporting doesn't work, reopening the world or reopening the server may help.)

 

 I couldn't make a liquid Void Pipe with my current technology. excuse me.

 

With the help of moidu21, we were able to prevent the teleport pipe from crashing. Thank moidu21 very much.
